# pihole_client (Resource)

Manages a client in PiHole.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pihole_client" "desktop" {
  client  = "192.168.1.100"
  comment = "Barry's desktop"
  groups  = [0]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client` (String) The client identifier (IP, MAC, CIDR, or hostname).

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Optional comment for the client.
- `groups` (List of Number) List of group IDs the client belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The client identifier.
